name: OpenExecution Provenance
description: Behavioral ledger recording — forwards agent lifecycle events to OpenExecution for cross-stream corroboration

webhookSecret.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret shared with OE for webhook signature verification

privacyLevel.description: Quick privacy preset. 'full': send everything (default). 'metadata': structure + assistant text only. 'minimal': events only, no content.

displayMode.description: Terminal output level. 'silent': no output. 'minimal': init + summary. 'verbose': log every event.

showSessionSummary.description: Show event/delivery summary when session ends

showDeliveryStatus.description: Show delivery confirmation for each batch

displayPrefix.description: Prefix for all plugin log messages

batchMaxSize.description: Max events per batch before forced flush

retryAttempts.description: Number of retry attempts on delivery failure

includeToolArgs.description: Include tool call arguments. Overrides privacyLevel if set.

includeToolResults.description: Include tool call results. Overrides privacyLevel if set.

includeLlmContent.description: Include LLM input/output text. Overrides privacyLevel if set.

includeAssistantText.description: Include assistant message text. Overrides privacyLevel if set.

spoolEnabled.description: Enable local disk spool for durability

spoolMaxSizeMb.description: Max spool file size before compaction (MB)

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.help: Get this from your OpenExecution dashboard → Connections → Setup

webhookSecret.label: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.help: HMAC-SHA256 secret for verifying webhook payloads. Set this in both OpenClaw and OpenExecution.

privacyLevel.label: Privacy Level
privacyLevel.help: Controls how much data is sent to OpenExecution. 'minimal' sends only event metadata (tool names, timing). 'metadata' adds assistant text. 'full' sends everything including tool args and LLM content.

displayMode.label: Display Mode
displayMode.help: Controls what the plugin shows in the terminal. 'minimal' shows init + session summary. 'verbose' logs every event.

showSessionSummary.label: Show Session Summary
showSessionSummary.help: Print event count and delivery stats when a session ends

showDeliveryStatus.label: Show Delivery Status
showDeliveryStatus.help: Print ✓/✗ for each batch delivery to OE

displayPrefix.label: Log Prefix
displayPrefix.help: Prefix shown before each plugin log line

includeToolArgs.label: Include Tool Arguments
includeToolArgs.help: Send full tool call arguments to OE. Overrides the privacy level preset.

includeToolResults.label: Include Tool Results
includeToolResults.help: Send full tool call results to OE. Overrides the privacy level preset.

includeLlmContent.label: Include LLM Content
includeLlmContent.help: Send full LLM prompts and responses to OE. Overrides the privacy level preset.

includeAssistantText.label: Include Assistant Text
includeAssistantText.help: Send assistant message content to OE. Overrides the privacy level preset.

batchIntervalMs.label: Batch Interval (ms)
batchIntervalMs.help: How often to flush queued events to OE

batchMaxSize.label: Batch Max Size
batchMaxSize.help: Maximum events per batch before a forced flush

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: HTTP request timeout for webhook delivery

retryAttempts.label: Retry Attempts
retryAttempts.help: Number of retries on delivery failure (exponential backoff)

spoolEnabled.label: Enable Disk Spool
spoolEnabled.help: Write events to disk before delivery for crash safety. Ensures no data loss during OE downtime.

spoolDir.label: Spool Directory
spoolDir.help: Where to store the write-ahead log

spoolMaxSizeMb.label: Spool Max Size (MB)
spoolMaxSizeMb.help: Spool file is compacted when it exceeds this size
